title: SR 25-2: Order Granting an Exemption from the Customer Identification Program Rule Requirement Related to a Bank Obtaining Taxpayer Identification Number Information from the Customer
title_normalized: Order Granting an Exemption from the Customer Identification Program Rule Requirement Related to a Bank Obtaining Taxpayer Identification Number Information from the Customer
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 25-2
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This Order applies to all banks supervised by the Federal Reserve that are subject to Customer Identification Program (CIP) Rule requirements under the Bank Secrecy Act.1
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
bm25_text: SR 25-2 Order Granting an Exemption from the Customer Identification Program Rule Requirement Related to a Bank Obtaining Taxpayer Identification Number Information from the Customer This Order applies to all banks supervised by the Federal Reserve that are subject to Customer Identification Program (CIP) Rule requirements under the Bank Secrecy Act.1 BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT:
